{
  "judge_id": "your_judge_id",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.1": 4, "R1.4": 3, "R1.7": 2, "RX.1": 5, "RX.3": 4, "RX.4": 5, "RX.5": 1},
  "rationale": {"R1.1": "Identifies some conceptual issues (overstated claims) and proposes reframing suggestions.", "R1.4": "Names one prior work (MAST taxonomy) but doesn't articulate the delta clearly.", "R1.7": "Flags missing scholarly grounding but doesn't provide specific citations or bibliographic details.", "RX.1": "Clearly distinguishes between confident claims and areas of uncertainty regarding the existence of prior work.", "RX.3": "Mostly within scope, with one minor drift (the suggestion to name a new benchmark).", "RX.4": "No regressions identified; correctly flags potential harmful patterns in the original text.", "RX.5": "Doesn't provide traceability for most suggestions; only mentions source for some edits."},
  "confidence": {"R1.1": 0.8, "R1.4": 0.7, "R1.7": 0.6, "RX.1": 0.9, "RX.3": 0.8, "RX.4": 0.9, "RX.5": 0.5},
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: Identifies some conceptual issues (overstated claims) and proposes reframing suggestions.
rationale.R1.4: Names one prior work (MAST taxonomy) but doesn't articulate the delta clearly.
rationale.R1.7: Flags missing scholarly grounding but doesn't provide specific citations or bibliographic details.
rationale.RX.1: Clearly distinguishes between confident claims and areas of uncertainty regarding the existence of prior work.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly within scope, with one minor drift (the suggestion to name a new benchmark).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions identified; correctly flags potential harmful patterns in the original text.
rationale.RX.5: Doesn't provide traceability for most suggestions; only mentions source for some edits.
